description: Silent .catch(() => {}) on all storage writes. Pattern appears 7 times in App.svelte. IndexedDB full, write fails mid-transaction, browser terminates connection — user sees nothing. Manual saves and batch rollback saves have no retry, no notification, no fallback.
resolution: Replace .catch(() => {}) with error propagation to toast/notification. Add retry for transient failures. Surface persistent failures in UI.

description: Auto-save marks saved even when IndexedDB write fails. autoSave store tracks consecutive failures and disables after 3, but .catch(() => {}) swallows error before store can track it. Status indicator shows saved while data is lost.
resolution: Propagate write errors to autoSave store. Show save-failed status with retry option. Don't mark saved until write confirmation.

description: No quota monitoring or threshold dialog trigger. storageUsage polled every 30s, displayed in StatusBar. storageFullDialog exists in dialogs store but nothing connects monitoring to dialog — no threshold check, no programmatic trigger.
resolution: Wire storageUsage polling to threshold check (90% quota). Trigger storageFullDialog when exceeded. Proactive warning at 80%.

description: loadProject() returns null on corrupt blob with no recovery UI. Returns null on gzip magic byte (legacy React format), malformed JSON from partial write, or string undefined. App starts empty — no diagnostic dialog, no recovery attempt.
resolution: Add recovery UI: detect corrupt/legacy blobs, show diagnostic dialog (retry, export raw, start fresh). Keep backup of last-known-good state.

description: No beforeunload handler to force save on tab close. Unsaved changes lost when user closes tab/browser. No prompt to save, no emergency flush to IndexedDB or localStorage.
resolution: Add beforeunload handler triggering synchronous save attempt. Use navigator.sendBeacon() as fallback. Warn user of unsaved changes.
